feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: Talking Zelda music while tossing this goron in this lava. What’s Zelda OST gets you bobbing your head? #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Talking Zelda music while tossing this goron in this lava. What’s Zelda OST gets you bobbing your head? #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Forgot to get the other shield and didn’t feel like going back to get it. To be honest, I am surprised the shield made it this far. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Forgot to get the other shield and didn’t feel like going back to get it. To be honest, I am surprised the shield made it this far. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: I really enjoyed this dungeon. Fire temple and Death Mountain was fun! Now we got 2 of the 3 fused shadows so onward to the next! #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: I really enjoyed this dungeon. Fire temple and Death Mountain was fun! Now we got 2 of the 3 fused shadows so onward to the next! #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: It took me a minute but I had fun restoring Lake Hylia from the twilight. The mini boss fight was unexpected and nice. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: It took me a minute but I had fun restoring Lake Hylia from the twilight. The mini boss fight was unexpected and nice. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Link done got himself hakai’ed and now he out here dying like Sackboy. Crazy world we live in… #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Link done got himself hakai’ed and now he out here dying like Sackboy. Crazy world we live in… #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: It’s crazy how Nintendo has never revisited the idea of a previous Link teaching the current one. Its so cool and fun! #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: It’s crazy how Nintendo has never revisited the idea of a previous Link teaching the current one. Its so cool and fun! #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Bulblins kidnapped Lila so good they snatched her memories. Link looked kinda hurt that he was forgotten. #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Bulblins kidnapped Lila so good they snatched her memories. Link looked kinda hurt that he was forgotten. #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: This scene was pretty funny. I actually thought the guards was gonna help but they got the hell up outta there. Really wild for that lmao 😂😂😂 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: This scene was pretty funny. I actually thought the guards was gonna help but they got the hell up outta there. Really wild for that lmao 😂😂😂 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Had just enough arrows to take round two against King Bulblin and got Lila and the Zora Prince to Kakariko Village. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Had just enough arrows to take round two against King Bulblin and got Lila and the Zora Prince to Kakariko Village. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: The Lake Temple is just one big ol’ water park. Link looks like he enjoyed the slip n’ slide. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: The Lake Temple is just one big ol’ water park. Link looks like he enjoyed the slip n’ slide. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I don’t get to carry this cute pups enough but I got quick pick me up before the water park. He’s so adorable and cute!!! 🥰 #asixverse #zelda #gaming #retrogaming #blerd
entry.content: I don’t get to carry this cute pups enough but I got quick pick me up before the water park. He’s so adorable and cute!!! 🥰 #asixverse #zelda #gaming #retrogaming #blerd

entry.title: This mid-boss came extra large but I enjoyed the reference to Ocarina of Time’s first boss. Love to see atuff like that. #asixverse #retrogaming #zelda #gaming #blerd
entry.content: This mid-boss came extra large but I enjoyed the reference to Ocarina of Time’s first boss. Love to see atuff like that. #asixverse #retrogaming #zelda #gaming #blerd

entry.title: This mid-boss is wild for sending its kids to the slaughter. Poor mini mid-bosses. 😢 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: This mid-boss is wild for sending its kids to the slaughter. Poor mini mid-bosses. 😢 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: And thats the Water Park Dungeon’s mid-boss done and dusted. We have now acquired the clawshot! But what’s up with Nintendo and the rule of three? 🤔 #asixverse #gaming #zelda #retrogaming #blerd
entry.content: And thats the Water Park Dungeon’s mid-boss done and dusted. We have now acquired the clawshot! But what’s up with Nintendo and the rule of three? 🤔 #asixverse #gaming #zelda #retrogaming #blerd

entry.title: I was all over the place during this boss fight but I have to admit its the most fun I’ve had during one. Morpheel was a good time. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was all over the place during this boss fight but I have to admit its the most fun I’ve had during one. Morpheel was a good time. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: This was a very chaotic and fun boss fight lol. I was fumbling all over the place and my fairy had to revive me. Great times! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: This was a very chaotic and fun boss fight lol. I was fumbling all over the place and my fairy had to revive me. Great times! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: And with the defeat of Morpheel we have completed the Water Park Temple and thus collected out last fused shadow. Praise! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: And with the defeat of Morpheel we have completed the Water Park Temple and thus collected out last fused shadow. Praise! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: We done completed all those dungeons and Zant just gonna pull up and take our fused shadow. He really trash for that… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: We done completed all those dungeons and Zant just gonna pull up and take our fused shadow. He really trash for that… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: This is the first time people could see me as a wolf and that took some getting adjusted too. 😅 #Asixverse #blerd #retrogaming #zelda #gaming
entry.content: This is the first time people could see me as a wolf and that took some getting adjusted too. 😅 #Asixverse #blerd #retrogaming #zelda #gaming

entry.title: i don’t know why this gave me so much trouble. I literally couldn’t carry a tone to save my life here. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: i don’t know why this gave me so much trouble. I literally couldn’t carry a tone to save my life here. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Skull Kid always causing problems. He got the goons on me but at least they aren’t throwing a moon at me… Its the little things sometimes. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Skull Kid always causing problems. He got the goons on me but at least they aren’t throwing a moon at me… Its the little things sometimes. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I remember this puzzle giving me a hard time as a youngin but its pretty fun and didn’t take me too long… Not sure how this is preventing someone from getting to the master sword 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I remember this puzzle giving me a hard time as a youngin but its pretty fun and didn’t take me too long… Not sure how this is preventing someone from getting to the master sword 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: We’ve finally obtained the Master Sword! Link to the past was always my favorite Master Sword sequence for nostalgia reasons but this went pretty hard! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: We’ve finally obtained the Master Sword! Link to the past was always my favorite Master Sword sequence for nostalgia reasons but this went pretty hard! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I thought I might be able to talk to the pups now that I can freely transform into a wolf but I can’t 😭 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I thought I might be able to talk to the pups now that I can freely transform into a wolf but I can’t 😭 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was really looking forward to what was in that chest in the Fire Temple you gotta backtrack for… this some bs 😡 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I was really looking forward to what was in that chest in the Fire Temple you gotta backtrack for… this some bs 😡 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Aye! Link been back and forth tryna save the world and now he got him some Hyrule groupies! Again I say, Link that dude! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Aye! Link been back and forth tryna save the world and now he got him some Hyrule groupies! Again I say, Link that dude! #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Wasn’t expecting to play Pilot Wings in Twilight Princess but here we are. Didn’t expect to get this first try but I guess I am just built like that. 😌 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Wasn’t expecting to play Pilot Wings in Twilight Princess but here we are. Didn’t expect to get this first try but I guess I am just built like that. 😌 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I am just minding my business collecting my rewards from Pilot Wings and here comes this poe all in my business… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I am just minding my business collecting my rewards from Pilot Wings and here comes this poe all in my business… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: It’s always a good time when King Bulblin comes out to play. This is our third time and I’m sure it won’t be our last. He’s pretty hard headed. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: It’s always a good time when King Bulblin comes out to play. This is our third time and I’m sure it won’t be our last. He’s pretty hard headed. 😅 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Why didn’t anyone tell me they was jumping folks in the Skull Graveyard! Now I gotta make redeads die again twice. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Why didn’t anyone tell me they was jumping folks in the Skull Graveyard! Now I gotta make redeads die again twice. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
